MELItem.Title: Electronic Engine Controls (EEC) NORM/ALTN Mode Lights

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated switches are verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify associated engine panel (P5) EEC mode switch operates normally (AMM DDG 73-21-02).

ListItem.Para: On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set associated EEC MAINT switch to TEST.
Set associated engine panel (P5) EEC mode switch to ALTN and verify the ENG EEC MODE L or R advisory message is displayed.
Set associated engine panel (P5) EEC mode switch to NORM and verify the ENG EEC MODE L or R advisory message is not displayed.
On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set associated EEC MAINT switch to NORM.
